title: Migrating to the EU
author: exitnode
aiHeadline: Migrating to the EU? Good luck, because apparently the EU is now so appealing that people are voluntarily moving there despite the endless paperwork, questionable food, and questionable weather.

title: iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM
author: anemll
aiHeadline: iPhone 17 Pro just proved that Apple can now fit a 400 billion parameter language model into your pocket, but let's be real, who needs that when you can just ask Siri to turn on the lights?

title: GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability
author: richtr
aiHeadline: GitHub is struggling with a measly three nines availability? Wow, I guess even the best can have off days. Maybe they should try some of that '99.9%' uptime stuff they always talk about.

title: POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere
author: tosh
aiHeadline: POSSE: Because who doesn't want to be a star on their own little corner of the internet? Just don't forget to bring your own spotlight.

title: Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia
author: mememememememo
aiHeadline: Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia: A tragic reminder that even in the age of advanced technology, sometimes things just don't go as planned. Or maybe it's just New York.
